title: Recursive orchestration: continuation engine + project checkpoints
description:
Generalize the cross-epic continuation engine to walk the project tree (design §5). Hard-depends on the container model from the data-model epic.

tk next ascends past a finished epic's siblings into the parent container; project boundaries STOP on a checkpoint by default (per-project flag), with a global autonomous-mode override. Epic→epic auto-continue is unchanged; epic retro/learnings are unchanged.

Deliverables:
- recursive frontier ascent in tk next (epic→sibling→parent container)
- project close-out checkpoint default + per-project auto-continue flag
- global autonomous-mode switch (config / run flag)
- regression: project-less roadmap path unchanged (two-tier stopping rule)
